## Merge checklist

- [ ] PR title includes the Linear key (example: `GOGU-7 Improve retry handling`)
- [ ] At least one commit includes the Linear key
- [ ] PR body includes magic-word reference (example: `Closes GOGU-7` or `Refs GOGU-7`)
